_comment: Official Olive Street Band color palette. All digital values are sRGB. Max 3 colors per design.

palette.name: Olive Green
palette.usage: Primary brand color. Dark backgrounds, main fill on light versions.

palette.name: Tan
palette.usage: Secondary color. Text and design elements on dark backgrounds.

palette.name: Cream
palette.usage: Accent, highlights, and contrast. Light background on reversed designs.

rules: Max 3 colors in any single design
Do not introduce new colors without explicit approval
Dark scheme: olive green background, tan + cream for text/elements
Light/reversed scheme: cream background, olive green text
No gradients on the band name text itself
